headline: Kimco Realty (KIM) Could Be a Great Choice
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Kimco Realty (KIM) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: Kimco Realty: A Sleep-Well-At-Night REIT With Growth Ahead
summary: Kimco Realty buy thesis: grocery-anchored REIT with occupancy gains, 5% FFO growth outlook, 4% yield. Click here to read more on the KIM REIT.

headline: Jim Cramer Calls Kimco Realty “Very Defensive”
summary: Kimco Realty Corporation (NYSE:KIM) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer highlighted the types of properties the firm owns, as he said: Kimco clocks in next, and now we’re talking about a REIT that owns actual strip malls as well as some mixed-use […]
